name: update_module_reference
short_description: Refresh module reference definition and instance(s)
full_help:
update_module_reference

Description: 
Refresh module reference definition and instance(s)

Syntax: 
update_module_reference  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<ips>...]

Returns: 
A return code indicating success or failure.

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<ips>]     module reference to be upgraded
              Values: IP instance name(s) within the design

Categories: 
IPFlow

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
